AI Assistant

Powered by Groq

Full admin control via chat — bulk entries, payments, rent updates, late fees, room management, monthly resets & more. The AI reads and writes your live data in real time.

AI Assistant

Hello! I'm your RentZen AI — I can read and write all your data.

📋 What I can do:
• Record & approve payments
• Bulk entry for any month
• Update rent, electricity, pending, late fees
• Move tenants in/out, manage rooms
• Apply late fees, monthly reset
• Send WhatsApp reminders
• Revenue & occupancy reports

Just type naturally — "Mark Rahul paid ₹7000 via Cash" or "Bulk entry for March 2026 for all tenants"

Select Payment to Edit

Bulk Payment Entry — All Tenants

Admin Tool — Bulk Payment Entry
Enter rent, electricity, pending and paid amount for each tenant for the selected month. Rent is pre-filled from room data. Bulk entries appear in Payment History & Revenue Reports but do NOT affect current month totals or tenant dashboards.
January entries affect only January. February entries update February — and any unpaid February balance is automatically carried forward into March's pending dues.

Please select a month above to load tenant rows.
